---
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    keep_md: yes
  word_document: default
  pdf_document:
    fig_caption: yes
    includes:
    keep_tex: yes
    number_sections: no
title: "WHAM Figures and Tables"
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{longtable}
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{caption,graphics}
  - \usepackage{makecell}
  - \usepackage{lscape}
  - \renewcommand\figurename{Fig.}
  - \captionsetup{labelsep=period, singlelinecheck=false}
  - \newcommand{\changesize}[1]{\fontsize{#1pt}{#1pt}\selectfont}
  - \renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.5}
  - \renewcommand\theadfont{}
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, tidy=FALSE, tidy.opts=list(width.cutoff=60), warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.align = "center")
type = "latex"
if(knitr::is_latex_output()) type = "latex"
if(knitr::is_html_output()) type = "html"
if(type == "latex") knitr::opts_chunk$set(out.width="100%")
options(knitr.kable.NA = "--")
#library(knitr)
#library(magrittr)
#library(pander)
#library(kableExtra)
#library(tinytex)
input <- readRDS("model_input.RDS")
```

# {.tabset}

## Figures {.tabset}

### Configuration

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
knitr::include_graphics("plots_png/diagnostics/summary_text.png")
```

### Input {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
plot_files <- list.files("plots_png/input_data", full.names = TRUE)
plot_files <- plot_files[grep("png", plot_files)]
not_ind <- integer()
```

#### Population Biology
```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("maturity", "weight_at_age_SSB")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Catch
```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("catch_by_fleet", "catch_age_comp")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Indices

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("scaled_indices.png", "age_comp.png", paste0("weight_at_age_", input$index_names))
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```


### Diagnostics {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
plot_files <- list.files("plots_png/diagnostics", full.names = TRUE)
plot_files <- plot_files[grep("png", plot_files)]
not_ind <- integer()
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
```

#### Aggregate Catch {.tabset}

##### Raw residuals

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("Catch_4panel")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

##### OSA residuals

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("OSA_resid_catch_4panel_fleet")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Catch Age Composition {.tabset}

##### Raw Residuals

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("Catch_age_comp_resids_fleet")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

##### OSA Residuals

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("OSA_resid_paa_6panel_fleet", "Catch_age_comp_osa_resids_fleet")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

##### Yearly Observed and Predicted

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("Catch_age_comp_fleet")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Aggregate Indices {.tabset}

##### Raw Residuals

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("Index_4panel")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

##### OSA Residuals

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("OSA_resid_catch_4panel_index")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Index Age Composition {.tabset} 

##### Raw Residuals

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("Catch_age_comp_resids_index")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

##### OSA Residuals

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("OSA_resid_paa_6panel_index", "Catch_age_comp_osa_resids_index")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

##### Yearly Observed and Predicted

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("Catch_age_comp_index")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Numbers at age

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("NAA")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Covariates

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("_diagnostic", "ecov")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

### Results {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
plot_files <- list.files("plots_png/results", full.names = TRUE)
plot_files <- plot_files[grep("png", plot_files)]
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
```

#### SSB, Abundance, and F {.tabset}

##### SSB and Recruitment

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("SSB_Rec_time", "SSB_Rec_stock", "SSB_Rec_loglog")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

##### SSB and F

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("SSB_F_trend", "F_byfleet")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

##### SSB at age

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("SSB_at_age_stock","SSB_at_age_proportion")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

##### Abundance at age

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("Numbers_at_age_stock", "Numbers_at_age_proportion", "NAA_dev_tile")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

##### CVs

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("CV_")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Natural Mortality

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("MAA_tile", "M_at_age")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Selectivity

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("SelAA_tile", "Selectivity")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Catchability

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("q_time_series")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```


#### Covariates

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("Ecov")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

### Retro {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
plot_files <- list.files("plots_png/retro", full.names = TRUE)
plot_files <- plot_files[grep("png", plot_files)]
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
```

#### SSB

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("SSB")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Fishing mortality

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("Fbar")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Recruitment

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("age_1")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### Abundance at age

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
#if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("NAA_retro")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

### Reference points {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
plot_files <- list.files("plots_png/ref_points", full.names = TRUE)
plot_files <- plot_files[grep("png", plot_files)]
```

#### SPR-based

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("FSPR_absolute","FSPR_relative","Kobe_status","FSPR_annual","FSPR_freq_annual","SPR_targets", "YPR_F")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

#### MSY-based

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
if(length(plot_files)) {
  file_grps <- c("MSY","msy")
  ind <- unlist(sapply(file_grps, \(x) grep(x, plot_files, fixed = TRUE)))
  not_ind <- c(not_ind, which(!(1:length(plot_files) %in% ind)))
  #ind <- c(ind, not_ind)
  files <- plot_files[ind]
  if(length(files)) knitr::include_graphics(files)
}
```

### Likelihood Components

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
knitr::include_graphics("plots_png/diagnostics/likelihood.png")
```

### Miscellaneous

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
plot_files <- list.files("plots_png/misc", full.names = TRUE)
plot_files <- plot_files[grep("png", plot_files)]
if(length(plot_files)) knitr::include_graphics(plot_files)
```

## Tables {.tabset}

### Parameter estimates

```{r par-table, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
out = readRDS("res_tables/parameter_estimates_table.RDS")
out <- sci_note(out,cols=1:4)

out <- out |> knitr::kable(format = type, booktabs = T, escape=F, longtable = T, row.names = T,label = "par-table",
    caption="Parameter estimates, standard errors, and confidence intervals. Rounded to 3 decimal places.", align = c(rep("r",4))) |>
    kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options=c("basic", "repeat_header")) |> kableExtra::landscape()
cat(knitr::knit_print(out))

input <- readRDS("res_tables/fit_input.RDS")
dat <- input$data
  stock.names.tab <- gsub("_", " ", input$stock_names, fixed = TRUE)
  region.names.tab <- gsub("_", " ", input$region_names, fixed = TRUE)
  index.names.tab <- gsub("_", " ", input$index_names, fixed = TRUE)
  fleet.names.tab <- gsub("_", " ", input$fleet_names, fixed = TRUE)
  stock.names.l <- gsub(" ", "-", input$stock_names, fixed = TRUE)
  region.names.l <- gsub(" ", "-", input$region_names, fixed = TRUE)
  index.names.l <- gsub(" ", "-", input$index_names, fixed = TRUE)
  fleet.names.l <- gsub(" ", "-", input$fleet_names, fixed = TRUE)
  stock.names.f <- gsub(" ", "_", input$stock_names, fixed = TRUE)
  region.names.f <- gsub(" ", "_", input$region_names, fixed = TRUE)
  index.names.f <- gsub(" ", "_", input$index_names, fixed = TRUE)
  fleet.names.f <- gsub(" ", "_", input$fleet_names, fixed = TRUE)
```

### Abundance at age

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
for(s in 1:dat$n_stocks) for(r in 1:dat$n_regions){
  out = readRDS(paste0("res_tables/",stock.names.f[s], "_", region.names.f[r], "_NAA_table.RDS"))
  out = round(out, 0)
  out <- out |> knitr::kable(format = type, booktabs = T, escape=F, longtable = T, row.names = T, 
    label = paste0(stock.names.l[s], "-", region.names.l[r], "-NAA-table"), 
      caption=paste0("Abundance at age (1000s) for ", stock.names.tab[s], " in ", region.names.tab[r],".")) |>
      kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options=c("basic", "repeat_header"))
  cat(knitr::knit_print(out))
}
```

### Fishing mortality at age by region

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
for(r in 1:dat$n_regions){
  out = readRDS(paste0("res_tables/",region.names.f[r], "_FAA_tot_table.RDS"))
  out = round(out, 3)
  out <- out |> knitr::kable(format = type, booktabs = T, escape=F, longtable = T, row.names = T, label = paste0(region.names.l[r], "-region-FAA-table"),
      caption=paste0("Total fishing mortality at age in ", region.names.tab[r], ".")) |>
      kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options=c("basic", "repeat_header"))
  cat(knitr::knit_print(out))
}
```

### Fishing mortality at age by fleet

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, error = FALSE, results='asis'}
for(r in 1:dat$n_fleets){
  out = readRDS(paste0("res_tables/",fleet.names.f[r], "_FAA_table.RDS"))
  out = round(out, 3)
  out <- out |> knitr::kable(format = type, booktabs = T, escape=F, longtable = T, row.names = T, label = paste0(fleet.names.l[r], "-fleet-FAA-table"),
      caption=paste0("Total fishing mortality at age in ", fleet.names.tab[r], ".")) |>
      kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options=c("basic", "repeat_header"))
  cat(knitr::knit_print(out))
}
```
